Interview Text:
Will:

(part 4)

God has also been changing Will's desires. He used to read a lot of science fiction and fantasy, but now he reads almost entirely spiritual growth books.

This transformation started when both he and his wife realized certain items block the spiritual movement in their house. For example they both heard independently God was saying to get rid of their trophies. Something about the trophies and what they represented was keeping the spirit from moving most easily through their house.

And there was a series of three fantasy books Will really liked. They had some spiritual undertones that seemed good until the last one. The ending just felt like a betrayal of the ethics and conviction that would have seemed commensurate with the rest of the books. It was a sort of pandering to all spirits and outlooks and saying they are okay. And they said it was okay to let any of them inhabit you.

First he decided he didn't really want the books anymore. They were three hardbacks in perfect condition. He set them by the door and had asked his wife to take them and sell them at a second hand bookstore.

But that night he had a dream. In it he was part of a heist. It was a plot to raid a federal building. More and more people were finding out about it and had to be paid off. Then it turned out the heist wasn't as valuable as they originally thought it would be. There came a point that Will knew he could have walked away without any connection to the crime. He could have been completely rid of the whole fiasco. But he decided to stay in, even though his part of the pool would be only $20.

When he woke up he thought, "I feel so stupid. That's not like me at all." But then God spoke to him. "IS IT NOT?" Will says the best way he could describe the emphasis with which he heard it was as if it were written in all CAPS in his head. $20 was about how much he would have gotten for the books. "I would have been on the wrong side of the law for that $20 bucks," He thought. "Why would I, after deciding something is bad, sell it for profit instead of destroy it?"

So he threw away the books.
Music Video Instructions: Imagine the kingdom happening behind the material one.
